seoTitle: How to Create a High-Converting Landing Page on Gumroad
metaDescription: Learn how to build a sales-focused landing page on Gumroad using the rich-text editor, cover images, and a clear call-to-action button.
intro: Every Gumroad product listing doubles as a landing page, so putting effort into its layout and copy can directly affect your conversion rate. This guide covers writing persuasive product copy, adding visuals, and previewing the page so it looks great on any device.

steps.heading: Start a new product listing
steps.body: Create your product so you have a page to build your landing page content on.

steps.heading: Write persuasive sales copy
steps.body: Use the rich-text editor to add headers, features, and benefit lists that explain what the buyer gets.

steps.heading: Add cover images and visuals
steps.body: Upload cover banners and thumbnails that grab attention and reflect what you're selling.

steps.heading: Customize your call-to-action
steps.body: Adjust the button text on your purchase component so it clearly tells buyers what to do next.

steps.heading: Preview and publish
steps.body: Check how the page looks on mobile and desktop before publishing it live.

faq.question: Can I fully customize the text on a Gumroad product page?
faq.answer: Yes, the rich-text editor lets you format headers, lists, and body copy to build a persuasive landing page.

faq.question: Can I change the buy button text?
faq.answer: Yes, you can customize your call-to-action copy on the purchase component.

faq.question: Does my Gumroad landing page work on mobile?
faq.answer: Gumroad product pages are designed to be responsive, and you can preview how they render before publishing.

faq.question: Can I add images throughout the description, not just the cover?
faq.answer: Yes, the rich-text editor supports adding images within the body of your product description.
